title: Skinline Rarity Variant Suite
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for Skinline Rarity Variant Suite, testing multi-image-reference, editing-workflow, style-transfer, commercial-mockup, identity-consistency with GPT Image 2.

en.title: Skinline Rarity Variant Suite
en.description: Create a skinline suite that pushes one playable character through rarity tiers, event variants, or themed cosmetic directions without losing identity.

zh-CN.title: 皮肤线与稀有度变体组
zh-CN.description: 围绕同一个角色做皮肤线，从基础款到高稀有度和活动变体，重点看身份保持和升级逻辑。
